Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7477 "RETURNOFTHESPACEWARRIORS-7477" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Return of the Space Warriors.prg"
Metadata.Notes: To default player one and two to joystick control, the following changes were made: 1. Changed the JMP $7148 instruction at $7488 to be JMP $1000 instead 2. Add a routine at $1000 which sets $65 and $66 to $02, before jumping to $7148 to carry on the normal code flow
